title: Amateur Callsign Prefixes
description: Structured representation of RSGB amateur callsign prefix entries, preserving the original line text and parsed prefix, entity, and cross-reference fields.

source.name: Radio Society of Great Britain International Prefixes
source.source_note: The RSGB page states that the list shows amateur callsign prefixes currently in use and notes that the ITU has not authorised any 1x and Qx series callsigns.

field_definitions.sequence: Original order in the cleaned RSGB-derived list after merging obvious line-wrap fragments.
field_definitions.prefixes: Leading amateur callsign prefix codes, compact wildcard terms, or compact prefix ranges parsed from the entry.
field_definitions.entity: Country, territory, island, organisation, or administrative entity associated with the prefix entry.
field_definitions.cross_references: Trailing related, prior, alternate, or parent prefix codes shown in the source line.
field_definitions.status_note: Machine-readable note for entries affected by visible RSGB caveats or source formatting issues.
field_definitions.raw_entry: Original source entry text after whitespace and dash normalisation and after joining clear continuation lines.
field_definitions.group: First character of the first parsed prefix, for coarse grouping.
field_definitions.notes: Optional editorial note explaining source formatting issues preserved in the record.
